---
title: "UIAO Modernization Program — Customer Document Series"
subtitle: "Eight-chapter consolidated narrative for the UIAO Modernization Program (Phases 0–5 + Program Overview + Reference)."
doc-type: series-index
series-id: uiao-modernization-program
date: 2026-04-25
aspirational: true
---

# UIAO Modernization Program — Customer Document Series

This series consolidates the UIAO Modernization Program customer
documents. Each chapter is a standalone phase document; the series
as a whole is the canonical narrative for the program.

All figures referenced in the chapters are generated by the sibling
script `generate-series-images.py` from prompts catalogued in
`IMAGE-PROMPTS.md`.

## Chapters

- **00** — [Program Overview](./00-program-overview.qmd)
  - Unified Identity-Addressing-Overlay Architecture
  - *Audience:* Executive stakeholders · architects · compliance teams · open-source contributors

- **01** — [Phase 0 — Modernization Master Plan](./01-phase0-master-plan.qmd)
  - Strategic framework for cloud governance modernization
  - *Audience:* CIO · CISO · ISSO · AO · 3PAO

- **02** — [Phase 1 — Modernization Mechanics](./02-phase1-modernization-mechanics.qmd)
  - Identity, device, policy, and compliance modernization for GCC-Moderate M365
  - *Audience:* CIO · CISO · ISSO · AO · 3PAO

- **03** — [Phase 2 — Governance OS Deployment](./03-phase2-governance-os.qmd)
  - Continuous drift detection, remediation orchestration, provenance tracking
  - *Audience:* Governance stewards · ISSO · ISSM · AO

- **04** — [Phase 3 — Optimization & Continuous ATO Alignment](./04-phase3-optimization-cato.qmd)
  - Validation, resilience, and cATO evidence model alignment
  - *Audience:* AO · ISSO · ISSM · 3PAO

- **05** — [Phase 4 — Cooperative Multi-Agent Governance](./05-phase4-multi-agent.qmd)
  - Drift intelligence and autonomous-agent governance topology
  - *Audience:* Governance architects · canon stewards · AO

- **06** — [Phase 5 — Full Modernization Canon Integration](./06-phase5-canon-integration.qmd)
  - Canon Integration Index, lifecycle states, and evidence archival
  - *Audience:* Canon stewards · governance review board · AO

- **07** — [Reference — Client-Server to Hybrid-Cloud Modernization](./07-client-server-to-hybrid-cloud-ref.qmd)
  - Cross-cutting reference for the legacy → hybrid-cloud transformation
  - *Audience:* Architects · platform engineers · operators

## Appendices

- **98** — [Diagram Generation Manifest](./98-diagram-generation-manifest.qmd)
  - 48-figure generation register; companion to `IMAGE-PROMPTS.md`
- **99** — [Needs-Input Register](./99-needs-input-register.qmd)
  - Cross-document backlog of `[MISSING]` / `[NEW (Proposed)]` items and standing-feedback status

## Image generation

This series uses **48 figures**, all generated via
Google Gemini's Nano Banana model. To regenerate:

```bash
export GEMINI_API_KEY="<your-key>"
python generate-series-images.py
```
